commands.review_summary:
The PR extracts Gateway protocol and gateway client/runtime helpers into private workspace packages while keeping `src/gateway/client.ts` as the public OpenClaw wrapper.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review findings: source inspection of the latest head shows `packages/gateway-client/src/**` is omitted from the updated smoke scope and the protocol AGENTS/CLAUDE guide is deleted without a package replacement. Runtime gateway pairing was not live-reproduced.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow repair can update the missing metadata, automation, and scoped-guide coverage; maintainers still need to decide the broader package-boundary and live-proof risk.
